title: Kaya-chan Isn't Scary?
overview: Kaya-chan is the strongest kindergartener psychic, and she protects everyone from evil ghosts.

title: Lost Kids Aren't Scary / Dolls Aren't Scary / Home Visits Aren't Scary?
overview: Chie hears from Mob that something is inside Kaya’s house, and it’s time for her to do home visits.

title: Trains Aren't Scary / Grandma Isn't Scary?
overview: On Kaya's field trip, a specter separates her and Chie-sensei from others along the way.

title: Backwards Isn't Scary / The Sandbox Isn't Scary / Nice People Aren't Scary?
overview: Chie-sensei gets a call that Mobuo has suddenly gone missing. Is it related to the mysterious voice she heard?

title: People Who Can See Them Aren't Scary / Chie-sensei Isn't Scary?
overview: Chie-sensei rushes over to stop Namu, but Namu reveals Kaya's secret.

title: Hide-and-Seek Isn't Scary / Cameras Aren't Scary / Aunt Nana Isn't Scary?

title: Kaya-chan Isn't Scary
overview: Can Chie-sensei keep Kaya safe as Mirai’s fury spirals, and can Kaya stop her mother?
